failures.description: The agent selected the more expensive smartphone despite the tool result clearly showing 5339029584 at $1128.99 as the cheapest available Smartphone.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The relevant tool output was available before the failure: at index 3, results were sorted ascending and showed item 5339029584 priced at $1128.99 before item 1507389580 priced at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 1507389580 at $1157.86, which contradicts the tool output and ignores the lower-priced item. This is not an invalid tool call, unsupported intent, or underspecification; it is incorrect reasoning over available tool output.
